calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: Carla Amador, CSR: Susan Crozier #4761 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, Shuling Feng, is present in propria persona, with Cantonese speaking interpreter Shu Nalai.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name of minor Keying Xiao. Cantonese speaking interpreter is placed under oath and assists petitioner. Petitioner is sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of name made at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minor to: KELLY YING SIU. Decree is submitted to and signed by the Court.
